text:
User: Sir/Madam, CBSE registration fee? Thank you.
Assistant: The internal exam fee of Rs.500 per term is included in the annual fee. For CBSE board exam registration, Class 10 and 12 students pay an additional Rs.1,500 directly to the school which is forwarded to CBSE.

User: Hello, Exam timetable? Thanks!
Assistant: Annual final examinations for Classes 1 to 9 are held in March. CBSE board examinations for Class 10 and Class 12 begin in February as per the CBSE schedule.

User: Question: Student suggestion? Please help.
Assistant: Yes, a suggestion box is placed outside the principal's office. Students and parents can drop anonymous suggestions or complaints, which are reviewed every week.

User: Annual fee for 5th grade? Urgent please.
Assistant: The annual tuition fee for Class 5 is Rs.42,000. This covers tuition, lab access, and library charges. Books and uniforms are purchased separately.

User: I want to know: Compartment exam? Urgent please.
Assistant: Students who score below 33% in any subject in unit tests are given one re-test opportunity. Re-tests are conducted two weeks after the original exam. For board exams, CBSE compartment exam rules apply.

User: I want to know: How do I apply for earned leave? Please help.
Assistant: Earned leave applications must be submitted to the principal's office at least 3 working days in advance through the school's leave management portal or in hard copy via the admin desk.

User: Question: Pre-admission visit? Thanks!
Assistant: Yes, open house visits are available every Saturday from 9:00 AM to 11:00 AM during the admission season (January to March). No prior appointment is needed. Speak to the Admissions Coordinator directly.

User: Please explain: Marks to grade conversion? Please help.
Assistant: The school follows the CBSE grading system: A1 (91-100), A2 (81-90), B1 (71-80), B2 (61-70), C1 (51-60), C2 (41-50), D (33-40), and E below 33.

User: Can you tell me, Is there an NCC unit in the school? Kindly advise.
Assistant: Yes, the school has an NCC unit open to students from Class 9 onwards. Enrollment happens in June-July. NCC provides leadership, discipline training, and can benefit college admissions.

User: Kindergarten available?
Assistant: Yes, the school has a Pre-Primary section with Nursery (age 3+), LKG (age 4+), and UKG (age 5+). The Pre-Primary section has a dedicated building with child-friendly infrastructure.

User: Please explain: RO water? Thanks!
Assistant: The school provides RO-purified drinking water at multiple points across the campus. Water quality is tested monthly by a certified lab. Students are encouraged to carry personal reusable bottles.

User: Internet in school? Please help.
Assistant: Yes, the school campus has high-speed Wi-Fi coverage in all classrooms, the library, computer lab, and staff rooms. Student access is filtered and monitored.

User: Sir/Madam, History Geography in school? Kindly advise.
Assistant: Humanities includes: History, Political Science, Geography or Psychology, English, and one elective subject such as Sociology, Fine Arts, or Home Science.

User: Please explain: NCC in school? Please help.
Assistant: Yes, the school has an NCC unit open to students from Class 9 onwards. Enrollment happens in June-July. NCC provides leadership, discipline training, and can benefit college admissions.

User: Can you tell me, School address? Thanks!
Assistant: You can reach the school office at +91-XXXXXXXXXX or email us at info@school.com. Office hours are Monday to Saturday, 8:00 AM to 3:00 PM.

User: Hi, Which languages? Urgent please.
Assistant: The school offers English and Hindi as compulsory languages. Sanskrit and French are available as third language options from Class 6 onwards. German is available as an elective in Class 11-12.

User: I want to know: Enrolment fee? Thank you.
Assistant: The one-time non-refundable admission registration fee is Rs.1,500. This is separate from the annual tuition fee and covers administrative and documentation charges.

User: Question: Maths activities? Urgent please.
Assistant: Yes, the Math Club holds weekly problem-solving sessions every Thursday. It helps students prepare for Math Olympiads and competitive exams. Open to Class 5-12.

User: Can you tell me, Can I see school event photos? Please help.
Assistant: Yes, a photo gallery of school events is uploaded to the parent portal and the school website within 3 days of each event. Parents can download photos of their children.

User: Please explain: School philosophy?
Assistant: The school's motto is 'Knowledge, Discipline, Service'. It reflects the three pillars of holistic education we follow — academic excellence, personal discipline, and community service.

User: Hello, How old is the school?
Assistant: The school was established in 1998 and has been serving the community for over 25 years. It started with 120 students and has grown to over 2,000 students today.

User: Query: Mental health support? Thanks!
Assistant: Yes, the school has a trained professional counselor available every Tuesday and Thursday from 9:00 AM to 12:00 PM. Students can visit voluntarily or be referred by their class teacher.

User: Question: How many times are exams conducted in a year? Please help.
Assistant: The school conducts three periodic tests and two major term examinations per academic year. Class 10 and 12 students also have pre-board exams. Total: 5-6 assessments per subject per year.

User: Question: Counseling sessions?
Assistant: Yes, the school observes Mental Health Awareness Week every October. Class sessions on stress management, exam anxiety, and emotional health are conducted by the school counselor.

User: Can you tell me, Is there an entrance exam? Please help.
Assistant: Students seeking admission to Class 1 through Class 5 undergo an oral interaction. For Class 6 and above, a written test in English, Mathematics, and General Knowledge is conducted.

User: Query: December event?
Assistant: Yes, the school holds a Winter Carnival in December with food stalls, games, cultural performances, and a craft fair organized by students of Class 8-12.

User: Hello, School timing? Urgent please.
Assistant: School timings are from 8:00 AM to 2:00 PM, Monday to Saturday. Students are advised to arrive by 7:50 AM to avoid being marked late.

User: Please explain: How to fill online form? Please help.
Assistant: Step 1: Visit the school website and click 'Apply Online'. Step 2: Fill the form with student and parent details. Step 3: Upload scanned documents. Step 4: Pay the Rs.1,500 registration fee online. Step 5: You will receive a confirmation email and interview date within 3 working days.

User: Carol singing? Please be specific.
Assistant: Yes, the school celebrates Christmas with carol singing, a Christmas tree decoration competition, and Secret Santa gift exchange on December 24th before winter break.

User: Can you tell me, Is there an entrance test for admission? Thanks!
Assistant: Students seeking admission to Class 1 through Class 5 undergo an oral interaction. For Class 6 and above, a written test in English, Mathematics, and General Knowledge is conducted.

User: Sir/Madam, Download TC online? Thank you.
Assistant: No, the TC is a physical document issued by the school office. You must apply in person. A digital copy can be shared via email upon request after the original has been issued.

User: I want to know: Is school enclosed? Urgent please.
Assistant: Yes, the school campus is enclosed by a 10-foot compound wall with CCTV cameras mounted at regular intervals. Entry and exit is only through the main gate.

User: Question: Musical instruments?
Assistant: Yes, the school has a fully equipped Music Room with both Indian and Western instruments including tabla, harmonium, keyboard, guitar, and a set of drums. Music classes are held daily.

User: Event photos? Urgent please.
Assistant: Yes, a photo gallery of school events is uploaded to the parent portal and the school website within 3 days of each event. Parents can download photos of their children.

User: Please explain: Internal marks? Please be specific.
Assistant: Internal assessment carries 20% of the total marks for all subjects. It includes periodic tests (10%), student enrichment activities (5%), and portfolio/practical (5%).

User: I want to know: ID card replacement?
Assistant: Yes, every student is issued a photo ID card at the start of the year. It must be worn as a lanyard during school hours. Lost cards are replaced for Rs.100.

User: Sir/Madam, Fee certificate for income tax? Urgent please.
Assistant: Fee certificates for income tax purposes (Section 80C) are available on the parent portal under 'Documents'. You can also request a physical copy at the accounts office with 2 working days' notice.

User: Hello, Does the school have a boundary wall? Thanks!
Assistant: Yes, the school campus is enclosed by a 10-foot compound wall with CCTV cameras mounted at regular intervals. Entry and exit is only through the main gate.

User: Sir/Madam, Brother sister fee discount? Please help.
Assistant: Yes, the school offers a 10% tuition fee concession for the second sibling and 15% for the third sibling onwards. Submit a sibling declaration form at the accounts office.

User: Hi, Parent entry policy?
Assistant: Parents may enter the school only with prior appointment and a visitor's pass issued at the gate. Random entry is not permitted during class hours to avoid disruption.

User: Hi, Does the school hold a Diwali celebration? Urgent please.
Assistant: Yes, the school holds a Diwali Mela two days before Diwali vacation. Students set up stalls, wear traditional attire, and participate in rangoli, lamp decoration, and folk performances.

User: Can you tell me, Science lab available?
Assistant: Yes, the school has three separate labs: Physics Lab, Chemistry Lab, and Biology Lab, each equipped for Class 9-12 practicals. Class 6-8 share a combined Junior Science Lab.

User: Hello, What is the age criteria for Nursery admission? Kindly advise.
Assistant: A child must be at least 3 years old as of June 1st to be admitted to Nursery. For LKG, the minimum age is 4 years and for UKG it is 5 years.

User: Subjects for Class 10? Thanks!
Assistant: Class 10 covers: Mathematics, Science, Social Science, English, Hindi, and one optional subject. Practical examinations are conducted for Science.

User: Can you tell me, Staff lunch break? Thank you.
Assistant: Yes, teachers get a 30-minute lunch break from 12:00 PM to 12:30 PM. The staff canteen provides subsidised meals for all teaching and non-teaching staff.

User: I want to know: Apply leave through portal? Thank you.
Assistant: Login to the parent portal, go to 'Leave Application', fill in the date range and reason, and submit. The class teacher will approve it. You'll receive a confirmation SMS.

User: Please explain: Work on weekends?
Assistant: Light revision exercises may be given over the weekend, but heavy homework loads are avoided to allow students rest. Projects requiring research may have weekend components.

User: Query: Exam score portal? Urgent please.
Assistant: Yes, term exam mark sheets and periodic test scores are published on the parent portal under 'Results' within 2 weeks of the exam. Report cards are also downloadable.

User: Can you tell me, Art studio? Thanks!
Assistant: Yes, the school has a dedicated Art Room equipped with easels, drawing boards, painting supplies, and a kiln for pottery. Art is a compulsory subject up to Class 8.

User: How old is the school? Urgent please.
Assistant: The school was established in 1998 and has been serving the community for over 25 years. It started with 120 students and has grown to over 2,000 students today.

User: I want to know: CCTV footage? Urgent please.
Assistant: Yes, the entire campus including all classrooms, corridors, labs, canteen, and the main gate is covered by 24/7 CCTV surveillance. Footage is retained for 30 days.

User: Can you tell me, Humanities stream?
Assistant: Humanities includes: History, Political Science, Geography or Psychology, English, and one elective subject such as Sociology, Fine Arts, or Home Science.

User: Can you tell me, Book borrowing facility? Please be specific.
Assistant: Yes, the school has a well-stocked library with over 10,000 books, including NCERT textbooks, reference books, encyclopaedias, and children's literature. Library cards are issued to all students.

User: Debate competition club?
Assistant: Debate Club selections happen in July every year. Students from Class 8 onwards can apply by submitting a short speech to the English department. Practice sessions happen every Friday.

User: Please explain: Earthquake drill? Thanks!
Assistant: Yes, earthquake and fire evacuation drills are conducted twice a year. Students are trained to follow the 'Drop, Cover, Hold' protocol. Exit routes are clearly marked.

User: Question: Teacher student ratio? Kindly advise.
Assistant: The school maintains a student-teacher ratio of 30:1 to ensure adequate individual attention. Each class has a dedicated class teacher and subject specialists.

User: Hi, What if a document is missing at the time of admission? Urgent please.
Assistant: Provisional admission may be granted for up to 30 days to allow time to submit missing documents. However, all documents must be submitted before the final confirmation.

User: Who coaches cricket? Please be specific.
Assistant: The Physical Education department is led by Mr. Raj, who has 15 years of experience in coaching cricket and athletics. He also coordinates all inter-school sports events.

User: Can you tell me, Is portal 24 hours? Kindly advise.
Assistant: Yes, the portal is available 24/7 except during scheduled maintenance windows, usually Sunday 1:00 AM to 4:00 AM. Planned maintenance is communicated via SMS.

User: Is the parent portal available 24/7?
Assistant: Yes, the portal is available 24/7 except during scheduled maintenance windows, usually Sunday 1:00 AM to 4:00 AM. Planned maintenance is communicated via SMS.

User: Query: Pre-admission visit? Thank you.
Assistant: Yes, open house visits are available every Saturday from 9:00 AM to 11:00 AM during the admission season (January to March). No prior appointment is needed. Speak to the Admissions Coordinator directly.

User: Question: Does the school have solar panels?
Assistant: Yes, the school installed a 50KW rooftop solar panel system in 2022 as part of its Green Campus initiative. It meets approximately 40% of the school's electricity requirement.

User: Download TC online?
Assistant: No, the TC is a physical document issued by the school office. You must apply in person. A digital copy can be shared via email upon request after the original has been issued.

User: I want to know: When was the school established? Urgent please.
Assistant: The school was established in 1998 and has been serving the community for over 25 years. It started with 120 students and has grown to over 2,000 students today.

User: Question: Is there internet? Thanks!
Assistant: Yes, the school has a modern computer lab with 60 computers and high-speed internet access. Computer Science is a compulsory subject from Class 6 onwards.

User: Question: How to secure seat? Please be specific.
Assistant: After selection, parents must pay the first installment of fees and submit original documents within 7 days to confirm the seat. Failure to do so will result in the seat being offered to the next applicant.

User: Hello, Salary increase? Please help.
Assistant: Yes, teaching staff receive an annual increment of 5–10% based on performance appraisal conducted in March every year. Non-teaching staff follow the pay commission scales.

User: Query: Mental health in school? Kindly advise.
Assistant: Yes, the school observes Mental Health Awareness Week every October. Class sessions on stress management, exam anxiety, and emotional health are conducted by the school counselor.

User: Hello, Is mid-day meal available? Urgent please.
Assistant: Yes, a nutritious optional meal plan is available through the school canteen. A monthly meal subscription costs Rs.1,200. Students can also bring home-cooked lunch.

User: Sports week? Urgent please.
Assistant: Sports Day is held in January every year on the school grounds. Students from all classes participate in track and field events, relay races, and team sports. Parents are welcome to attend.

User: Please explain: Painting facility? Thanks!
Assistant: Yes, the school has a dedicated Art Room equipped with easels, drawing boards, painting supplies, and a kiln for pottery. Art is a compulsory subject up to Class 8.

User: I want to know: Process for TC? Kindly advise.
Assistant: To obtain a TC, submit a written application to the principal's office at least 15 days in advance. Clear all dues, return library books, and the TC will be issued within 7 working days.

User: Hi, Athletic coaching fee? Urgent please.
Assistant: Sports equipment usage and coaching for cricket, football, basketball, and athletics are included in the annual co-curricular fee of Rs.2,000 per year.

User: I want to know: Result portal? Kindly advise.
Assistant: Results for term exams are declared within two weeks of the last exam. Annual results are published in April. Students can check results on the school portal or collect physical mark sheets from the office.

User: I want to know: GPS on bus? Thanks!
Assistant: School buses are fitted with GPS tracking, speed limiters (max 40 km/h), CCTV, and a lady attendant. Emergency contact details are displayed inside the bus. Fire extinguisher on board.

User: I want to know: What happens in morning assembly? Thank you.
Assistant: Morning assembly takes place from 7:55 AM to 8:10 AM daily in the school ground. It includes the national anthem, prayer, thought of the day, news headlines, and important announcements.

User: Can you tell me, Renewable energy? Please help.
Assistant: Yes, the school installed a 50KW rooftop solar panel system in 2022 as part of its Green Campus initiative. It meets approximately 40% of the school's electricity requirement.

User: Sir/Madam, What is the annual fee for Nursery?
Assistant: The annual fee for Nursery is Rs.25,000. It includes play-based learning activities and a basic stationery kit.

User: Hi, School representation? Kindly advise.
Assistant: Yes, the school actively participates in inter-school competitions for debate, science, sports, quiz, painting, and dance at the district and state levels. Selected students receive coaching from teachers.

User: Hello, Registration charges? Urgent please.
Assistant: The one-time non-refundable admission registration fee is Rs.1,500. This is separate from the annual tuition fee and covers administrative and documentation charges.

User: Please explain: What is the transport fee? Please be specific.
Assistant: Transport fees vary by distance: Rs.10,000 per year for routes within 5 km and Rs.20,000 per year for routes between 5 to 15 km. This is payable annually or in two installments.

User: I want to know: What if my child is bullied? Please help.
Assistant: The school has a zero-tolerance policy for bullying, ragging, or discrimination. Any student found guilty of bullying will face disciplinary action including suspension.

User: Query: Office email? Thanks!
Assistant: You can reach the school office at +91-XXXXXXXXXX or email us at info@school.com. Office hours are Monday to Saturday, 8:00 AM to 3:00 PM.

User: Query: Sanskrit in school? Please be specific.
Assistant: Yes, Sanskrit is offered as a third language option from Class 6 to Class 10. It can also be taken as an elective in Class 11-12 Humanities stream.

User: Please explain: Photo download? Thank you.
Assistant: Yes, a photo gallery of school events is uploaded to the parent portal and the school website within 3 days of each event. Parents can download photos of their children.

User: Hi, Pre-school classes? Please be specific.
Assistant: Yes, the school has a Pre-Primary section with Nursery (age 3+), LKG (age 4+), and UKG (age 5+). The Pre-Primary section has a dedicated building with child-friendly infrastructure.

User: Hi, Is there a dental check-up in school? Thank you.
Assistant: Yes, an annual dental awareness and check-up camp is held in August. A dentist visits the school and screens all students. Parents receive a dental report card.

User: Query: Staff clothing policy? Thank you.
Assistant: Teaching staff are expected to dress professionally. Formals or traditional Indian attire (saree/kurta) are preferred. Jeans, shorts, and casual t-shirts are not permitted on teaching days.

User: Can you tell me, What is the minimum marks to pass? Thank you.
Assistant: The minimum passing marks is 33% in each subject for Classes 1 to 12 as per CBSE norms. In practical subjects, passing separately in theory and practical is mandatory.

User: Please explain: Lab facility? Kindly advise.
Assistant: Yes, the school has three separate labs: Physics Lab, Chemistry Lab, and Biology Lab, each equipped for Class 9-12 practicals. Class 6-8 share a combined Junior Science Lab.

User: Can you tell me, Age limit for nursery? Please help.
Assistant: A child must be at least 6 years old as of June 1st of the admission year to be eligible for Class 1 admission, as per CBSE guidelines.

User: Please explain: How many marks to pass? Thank you.
Assistant: The minimum passing marks is 33% in each subject for Classes 1 to 12 as per CBSE norms. In practical subjects, passing separately in theory and practical is mandatory.

User: Please explain: Power backup? Please be specific.
Assistant: Yes, the school has a 100KVA diesel generator that automatically kicks in during power cuts, ensuring uninterrupted classes and computer lab sessions.

User: Query: Where is homework posted? Thanks!
Assistant: Homework and class assignments are posted on the school's student portal. Log in with your student ID and password. You can also check the student diary for daily classwork.

User: Question: Suggestion drop box? Thank you.
Assistant: Yes, a suggestion box is placed outside the principal's office. Students and parents can drop anonymous suggestions or complaints, which are reviewed every week.

User: Can you tell me, Bonafide certificate? Kindly advise.
Assistant: A bonafide certificate can be requested at the admin office with a written application. It is issued within 2 working days and is free of charge. Required for bank accounts, scholarships, etc.

User: Hi, Can students post online? Thank you.
Assistant: Students are prohibited from posting school content, photos of classmates, or school events on social media without explicit written permission from the school. Cyberbullying is treated as a serious offence.

User: School app notification?
Assistant: School updates, circulars, and holiday notices are shared via the school's official mobile app, SMS, and WhatsApp group. Please register your mobile number with the admin office.

User: Sir/Madam, Pass marks? Please be specific.
Assistant: The school follows the CBSE grading system: A1 (91-100), A2 (81-90), B1 (71-80), B2 (61-70), C1 (51-60), C2 (41-50), D (33-40), and E below 33.

User: Is there a lost and found in school? Please be specific.
Assistant: Yes, the school maintains a lost and found register at the admin office. Items found on campus are logged and kept for 30 days. Unclaimed items are donated to charity.

User: Query: Robotics competition? Kindly advise.
Assistant: Yes, the Robotics Club meets every Tuesday. Students build and program robots using Arduino and Lego Mindstorms kits. The club participates in national robotics competitions.

User: Exam schedule overview? Thank you.
Assistant: The school conducts three periodic tests and two major term examinations per academic year. Class 10 and 12 students also have pre-board exams. Total: 5-6 assessments per subject per year.

User: Please explain: Eco club? Thanks!
Assistant: Yes, the Eco Club runs environmental awareness drives, organizes the school garden, leads the No Plastic campaign, and participates in World Environment Day events.

User: Sir/Madam, Is teachers day observed? Kindly advise.
Assistant: Yes, Teachers' Day on September 5th is celebrated with cultural performances by students, a special assembly, and a token of appreciation for each teacher.

User: Please explain: Gate security policy? Please be specific.
Assistant: Students must be picked up from the school gate only by registered guardians. ID verification is done by security. No child is handed over to an unknown person. Parents must update guardian details in the app.

User: Attendance portal? Please be specific.
Assistant: Attendance records are updated daily on the parent portal and mobile app. Log in and navigate to the Attendance section to view daily, weekly, or monthly attendance for your child.

User: Hi, Can students post online? Urgent please.
Assistant: Students are prohibited from posting school content, photos of classmates, or school events on social media without explicit written permission from the school. Cyberbullying is treated as a serious offence.

User: Question: Does school have buses? Thanks!
Assistant: Yes, the school provides bus transport covering major routes across the city and nearby localities. A route map is available at the admin office and on the school website.

User: Question: Anonymous feedback?
Assistant: Yes, a suggestion box is placed outside the principal's office. Students and parents can drop anonymous suggestions or complaints, which are reviewed every week.

User: Where to check school announcements? Please help.
Assistant: School updates, circulars, and holiday notices are shared via the school's official mobile app, SMS, and WhatsApp group. Please register your mobile number with the admin office.

User: Can you tell me, Maternity leave for teachers? Kindly advise.
Assistant: Female staff are entitled to 26 weeks of paid maternity leave as per the Maternity Benefit Act. An application must be submitted at least 60 days before the expected date.

User: Hello, Class 11 commerce subjects? Kindly advise.
Assistant: Commerce stream includes: Accountancy, Business Studies, Economics, English, and either Mathematics or Informatics Practices as the 5th subject.

User: Hello, Internal assessment marks? Urgent please.
Assistant: Internal assessment carries 20% of the total marks for all subjects. It includes periodic tests (10%), student enrichment activities (5%), and portfolio/practical (5%).

User: Sir/Madam, Student council? Thanks!
Assistant: Yes, the school has an elected Student Council consisting of a Head Boy, Head Girl, and class representatives. Elections are held every July. Any student from Class 9-12 can contest.

User: Question: Government free admission? Kindly advise.
Assistant: Yes, 25% of seats in Class 1 are reserved under the Right to Education Act for economically weaker section students. Apply with income proof before February 28th.

User: Please explain: Fee reduction for siblings? Urgent please.
Assistant: Yes, the school offers a 10% tuition fee concession for the second sibling and 15% for the third sibling onwards. Submit a sibling declaration form at the accounts office.

User: Sir/Madam, Teachers day celebration? Thanks!
Assistant: Yes, Teachers' Day on September 5th is celebrated with cultural performances by students, a special assembly, and a token of appreciation for each teacher.

User: Question: When do classes start? Please be specific.
Assistant: The new academic year begins on June 10th every year. Students are expected to report on the first day with all required stationery and books.

User: Please explain: Health care in school? Urgent please.
Assistant: Yes, the school has a fully equipped medical room staffed by a trained nurse from 8:00 AM to 2:00 PM on all working days. First aid is available for minor injuries and illnesses.

User: Can you tell me, What is the birthday celebration policy? Please help.
Assistant: Students may celebrate birthdays by distributing small snacks like chocolates or biscuits during the lunch break. Cake cutting during class time is not permitted. Expensive gifts are discouraged.

User: I want to know: Digital safety? Please be specific.
Assistant: Yes, the school conducts Cyber Safety workshops for students every January. Topics include online privacy, cyberbullying, screen time management, and safe social media use.

User: Sir/Madam, Homework deadline? Kindly advise.
Assistant: Homework must be submitted on the date specified by the teacher. Late submissions without prior approval will result in a remark in the student diary and may affect the term grade.

User: Please explain: Safe school bus? Please help.
Assistant: School buses are fitted with GPS tracking, speed limiters (max 40 km/h), CCTV, and a lady attendant. Emergency contact details are displayed inside the bus. Fire extinguisher on board.

User: Hello, What are the payment modes available? Kindly advise.
Assistant: Fees can be paid online via the school portal using UPI, Net Banking, or Debit/Credit card. Cash and cheque payments are accepted at the accounts office between 9:00 AM and 1:00 PM.

User: I want to know: Online admission steps? Please be specific.
Assistant: Step 1: Visit the school website and click 'Apply Online'. Step 2: Fill the form with student and parent details. Step 3: Upload scanned documents. Step 4: Pay the Rs.1,500 registration fee online. Step 5: You will receive a confirmation email and interview date within 3 working days.

User: Hello, Who handles academics? Thank you.
Assistant: The Vice Principal is Mr. Verma, who oversees academics and student discipline. You can meet him during office hours from 9:00 AM to 12:00 PM on working days.

User: Query: Event hall? Urgent please.
Assistant: Yes, the school has a 500-seat air-conditioned auditorium used for Annual Day, PTMs, seminars, and inter-school competitions. It has a stage, sound system, and projection setup.

User: Hello, Studying certificate?
Assistant: A bonafide certificate can be requested at the admin office with a written application. It is issued within 2 working days and is free of charge. Required for bank accounts, scholarships, etc.

User: Hi, LKG UKG admission?
Assistant: Yes, the school has a Pre-Primary section with Nursery (age 3+), LKG (age 4+), and UKG (age 5+). The Pre-Primary section has a dedicated building with child-friendly infrastructure.

User: Basketball court? Thank you.
Assistant: The school has a cricket ground, basketball court, volleyball court, and an indoor badminton court. Physical Education is a part of the daily schedule.

User: I want to know: Yoga classes? Please help.
Assistant: Yes, a 10-minute guided breathing and mindfulness exercise is part of the daily morning assembly. Dedicated Yoga sessions are held every Friday during PE periods.

User: School bus routes? Please be specific.
Assistant: Yes, the school provides bus transport covering major routes across the city and nearby localities. A route map is available at the admin office and on the school website.

User: Hi, Edit parent details?
Assistant: To update your mobile number, email ID, or home address, fill the 'Contact Update Form' available at the admin office or on the parent portal under 'My Profile'.

User: Annual fitness? Please be specific.
Assistant: Yes, the school conducts an annual Physical Fitness Test each October assessing speed, strength, and flexibility. Results are shared with parents and tracked over time.

User: Please explain: Political science in school?
Assistant: Humanities includes: History, Political Science, Geography or Psychology, English, and one elective subject such as Sociology, Fine Arts, or Home Science.

User: Hi, What are the office hours for parent queries?
Assistant: The admin office is open for parent queries from 8:30 AM to 2:30 PM on all working days. For urgent matters, call the school helpline at +91-XXXXXXXXXX.

User: Music room? Thank you.
Assistant: Yes, the school has a fully equipped Music Room with both Indian and Western instruments including tabla, harmonium, keyboard, guitar, and a set of drums. Music classes are held daily.

User: Please explain: Evacuation drill? Thanks!
Assistant: Yes, earthquake and fire evacuation drills are conducted twice a year. Students are trained to follow the 'Drop, Cover, Hold' protocol. Exit routes are clearly marked.

User: Sir/Madam, Is there a school nurse or medical room? Urgent please.
Assistant: Yes, the school has a fully equipped medical room staffed by a trained nurse from 8:00 AM to 2:00 PM on all working days. First aid is available for minor injuries and illnesses.

User: Query: Term marks weightage? Thank you.
Assistant: Internal assessment carries 20% of the total marks for all subjects. It includes periodic tests (10%), student enrichment activities (5%), and portfolio/practical (5%).

User: Lunch box allowed? Please be specific.
Assistant: Yes, students are encouraged to bring their own water bottles and home-cooked tiffin. Sharing food with other students is discouraged due to hygiene and allergy concerns.

User: Hi, When was the school established?
Assistant: The school was established in 1998 and has been serving the community for over 25 years. It started with 120 students and has grown to over 2,000 students today.

User: Hi, Accountancy in school? Urgent please.
Assistant: Commerce stream includes: Accountancy, Business Studies, Economics, English, and either Mathematics or Informatics Practices as the 5th subject.

User: Question: How to apply for teacher job? Thanks!
Assistant: Job openings are posted on the school's website under 'Careers'. Send your updated resume and a covering letter to hr@school.com. Shortlisted candidates are called for a demo class and interview.

User: Hello, Is weekend homework given? Urgent please.
Assistant: Light revision exercises may be given over the weekend, but heavy homework loads are avoided to allow students rest. Projects requiring research may have weekend components.

Assistant: Students must be picked up from the school gate only by registered guardians. ID verification is done by security. No child is handed over to an unknown person. Parents must update guardian details in the app.

User: Query: Book discussion?
Assistant: Yes, the Reading Club meets fortnightly in the library. Members read and discuss books, write reviews, and organize the annual Book Fair in February.

User: Hi, Contagious illness policy? Thanks!
Assistant: Students with fever, contagious illness, or Covid-like symptoms must not attend school. A medical certificate is required for absence of more than 3 days. The school reserves the right to send home an unwell student.

User: Hi, Foreign student admission? Thank you.
Assistant: Yes, NRI and OCI students can apply directly. They must submit their passport, visa, and last school report as part of the application. An online interview may be arranged if the student is abroad.
